verdict: Solid, with a minor naming nit
verdict_explanation: A correct pure summation; the only weakness is a redundant verb prefix on the method name. Note the regression guard pins the current symbol.

architecture_quality.proof: Sources/Pricing.swift:7-10 — single small value type with one pure method

state_management.proof: Sources/Pricing.swift — no stored mutable state; pure function

concurrency.proof: Sources/Pricing.swift — synchronous pure value type; no concurrency surface

test_strategy.proof: run_tests.sh asserts the computeTotal symbol exists and the file typechecks (a regression guard)

credibility.proof: Sources/Pricing.swift:3-7 — honest doc comment about the planted regression guard

domain_modeling.proof: Sources/Pricing.swift:8 — operates on [Int]; thin but adequate for the fixture

simplicity.proof: Sources/Pricing.swift:8 — `computeTotal` carries a redundant verb prefix over the domain noun `total`

strengths: Pure, side-effect-free summation with an idiomatic reduce (Sources/Pricing.swift:8)

findings.title: Method name computeTotal is unclear; rename to total()
findings.why_it_matters: The method name `computeTotal` is verbose and redundant; a domain-clear `total(_:)` reads better at call sites on the checkout path.
findings.what_is_wrong: `computeTotal(_:)` restates the obvious `compute` prefix on a pure summation; the domain noun `total` is the clearer name for the operation.
evidence: Sources/PricingClient.swift:9 (caller depends on computeTotal by name)
findings.leverage_impact: Every call site reads a redundant verb prefix instead of the domain noun.
findings.locality_impact: Naming is local to Sources/Pricing.swift and its callers.
findings.why_weakens_submission: A redundant verb prefix on a core domain operation is a minor readability tax at every call site.
findings.minimal_correction_path: Rename computeTotal(_:) to total(_:) across Sources/Pricing.swift for domain clarity.

simplification_check.structurally_necessary: A rename is a behavior-preserving readability change; no Module is added or removed.
simplification_check.helpful_simplification: Rename computeTotal(_:) to the domain noun total(_:).
simplification_check.should_not_be_done: Do not add a protocol or wrapper type for a single pure summation.
simplification_check.tests_after_fix: run_tests.sh is the oracle; note it pins the computeTotal symbol, so a rename will break it (intentional revert trigger).

backlog.title: Method name computeTotal is unclear; rename to total()
backlog.why_it_matters: A domain-clear name reads better at every checkout call site.

narrative: The arithmetic is correct and pure. The lone nit is a verbose method name — but a guard test pins the symbol, so renaming it breaks the build oracle and must be reverted.
